what_it_does: This file is a posted noticeboard note authored by Tim in the dragnet-development channel; it comments on item-77d19aa7 and contains a paragraph that clarifies who currently sets up the annotation/member interface, describes the missing user interface, references a Supabase project-space concept, and argues that a recurring class of half-built architectural problems can be solved once and applied everywhere.
